lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained over the years. The exterior paint still shows a great shine, though upon closer inspection, you will find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small, shallow scratch on the passenger side door. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster consistent with its age. Mechanically, the car is sound, starts up without hesitation, and has a full service history. It’s a dependable choice for anyone looking for a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

Looking for a reliable ride that won't break the bank? This vehicle is in fair condition and ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a dependable choice for anyone seeking a solid daily driver at a great value. It’s the perfect blend of utility and affordability!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly 'as-is.' It has significant mechanical issues, including a persistent engine misfire and a transmission that slips when shifting into second gear. Cosmetically, the body shows heavy rust along the wheel wells and several deep scratches and dents throughout. The interior is in rough shape, with significant tearing on the driver's seat and a non-functional climate control system. This car requires substantial work to be reliable and is priced accordingly for a buyer looking for a major project or a donor vehicle for parts.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is some minor cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior from normal use.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant mechanical repairs to be functional. The exterior shows heavy rust and multiple dents. The interior is heavily worn and in need of restoration.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in peerless condition. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior, reflects a standard of care typically reserved for private collections. Mechanically beyond reproach and visually indistinguishable from new, this unit represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered in a climate-controlled garage and the paint is just flawless. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the new-car headache, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance records included. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s specimen, preserved in a state that rivals its original showroom delivery. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple with no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car has been maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy, evidenced by a comprehensive folder of service records from day one. It drives tight, smooth, and powerful, offering the exact experience intended by the manufacturer. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a time-capsule quality vehicle that has been garage-kept and pampered its entire life.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in showroom condition, featuring flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical performance. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure a driving experience indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in superlative, showroom-grade condition, reflecting a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the most rigorous standards of excellence, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from new. Meticulously maintained and aesthetically flawless, this unit represents the definitive benchmark for its model year.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty in person! It's in absolutely flawless shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied this car since day one, and it really shows in every little detail. If you're looking for total perfection and a ride that feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look and fall in love!

Presenting an impeccable 2018 BMW M4 Competition Package, a masterclass in F82 chassis dynamics. This specimen is powered by the S55 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-six, producing a factory-rated 444 hp and 406 lb-ft of torque, managed by a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT. The Competition specification includes recalibrated Adaptive M Suspension, revised spring rates, and an Active M Differential for surgical cornering precision. This vehicle retains its structural integrity with a CFRP (carbon-fiber reinforced plastic) strut tower brace and roof, significantly lowering the center of gravity. It sits on forged 20-inch Star-spoke 666M wheels wrapped in fresh Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. Every service interval has been documented, ensuring the mechanical tolerances remain within factory specifications. The paint is flawless, protected by a multi-layer ceramic coating, and the Merino leather interior shows no signs of bolster wear or UV degradation. This is a collector-grade example for the purist who demands mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garaged. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included.

Offered here is an absolute gem: a meticulously maintained vehicle that truly defines 'showroom quality.' From the moment you lay eyes on the deep, mirror-like finish of the original factory paint, you’ll see this isn't your average used car. There are zero stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks to be found across the entire body. Step inside, and the interior remains in a pristine state—the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the cabin retains its original integrity. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the precision climate control, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous adherence to the manufacturer’s maintenance schedule with all service records meticulously organized and included. This car has been garage-kept since day one, protected from the elements, and driven only on fair-weather weekends. If you are a discerning collector or a driver who refuses to compromise on excellence, this is the flawless vehicle you’ve been searching for.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a rigorous commitment to automotive excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished caliber and uncompromised mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, offered in showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless coachwork and a meticulously maintained interior that reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence. Mechanically beyond reproach, it delivers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original manufacture. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty! It is in pristine, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve kept it pampered and tucked away in the garage, so it’s sparkling clean and ready for its next adventure. If you’re looking for a ride that feels brand new but without that dealership headache, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin; I promise you’re going to fall in love with it!

This E46 M3 is a pristine example of the S54-powered era. The high-revving 3.2L atmospheric straight-six features individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering linear power to an 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain is mechanically flawless. The chassis remains structurally sound with reinforced subframe mounts and refreshed bushings, while the variable M differential lock provides sharp, predictable power delivery. Every component, from the factory-spec dampers to the cross-drilled rotors, reflects a vehicle maintained to the highest standards of mechanical excellence.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents or mechanical issues. Interior and exterior like new.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior paint finish that is absolutely flawless with a deep, mirror-like shine and zero rock chips or swirls. The interior is equally impressive, featuring premium leather that remains supple and completely free of wear, creases, or odors. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the heated seats, operates with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. This single-owner, non-smoker vehicle comes with a full set of service records, two original keys, and the peace of mind that it has never seen a rainy day. If you are looking for a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks, this is the one.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it represents a rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast. Every surface and mechanical component reflects the highest standards of care, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Presented for the most discerning buyer, this vehicle stands as an exemplar of automotive preservation. Every facet of this specimen—from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously maintained interior—remains in showroom condition. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber, offering a driving experience that remains indistinguishable from its original manufacture.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty in person to believe it. It's honestly in pristine condition—looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it really shows in every detail. If you're looking for a ride that's practically flawless and feels brand new, this is absolutely the one for you. Come take it for a spin before someone else snaps it up!
Offered is an investment-grade 2003 BMW M3 (E46) in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54
Mint condition. One owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, meticulously preserved by its original owner in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with no swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings, while the interior remains in pristine state, retaining its original scent and supple leather texture. Every maintenance interval has been strictly performed by authorized technicians, with a complete paper trail included. From the unmarked alloy wheels to the crystal-clear glass, every detail reflects a level of care rarely seen. It delivers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new, offering both mechanical perfection and aesthetic excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in truly pristine condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From the flawless exterior finish to the factory-fresh interior appointments, every detail adheres to the highest mechanical and aesthetic benchmarks. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive example of its class.
